title: Medicare Assumption and Report Updates
subtitle: Message from Ron
intro: This update clarifies Medicare/IRMAA inflation assumptions and adds a portfolio-focused report summary for advisor review.

items.title: Medicare costs are separate from IRMAA MAGI thresholds
items.body: The model now separates IRMAA MAGI Threshold Inflation from Medicare Cost Inflation. IRMAA MAGI Threshold Inflation controls how the income levels for IRMAA tiers grow; Medicare Cost Inflation controls standard Part B premiums and IRMAA surcharge dollar amounts.

items.title: New 6-year portfolio implementation summary
items.body: The general report now includes this year plus the next five years of planned HSA withdrawals, inherited IRA draws, traditional IRA draws, and Roth conversions by person. It is intended to help discuss how the portfolio should be positioned to support the plan.

items.title: Advisor review focus
items.body: Use the new summary to discuss the traditional IRA safety sleeve, inherited IRA runway, and in-kind Roth conversion candidates. Roth conversions move assets; they are not spending.
